name: Fronius Solar Inverter Monitoring and Energy Management API
what_it_does: Fronius solar inverter monitoring and energy management REST API for solar installers, energy managers, and smart home integrators to access real-time and historical solar production data, inverter status, energy flow data, and system performance metrics from Fronius inverters — enabling automated solar monitoring, energy yield analysis, grid connection management, and PV system performance optimization through Fronius Solar.web cloud monitoring and local inverter API. Enables AI agents to manage power flow for real-time solar production monitoring automation, handle energy yield for solar performance analytics automation, access inverter status for system health monitoring automation, retrieve system logs for fault detection and maintenance automation, manage battery storage for energy storage optimization automation, handle smart meter for consumption vs production balance automation, access solar.web for cloud-connected monitoring automation, retrieve device info for inverter configuration management automation, manage export limits for grid operator compliance automation, and integrate Fronius with building energy management, solar monitoring, and smart grid platforms for PV system automation.
use_cases: Monitoring real-time solar production and energy flow from Fronius inverters for commercial solar system automation agents
Analyzing historical energy yield and performance metrics for solar ROI and maintenance planning automation agents
Integrating Fronius solar data with building energy management systems for consumption optimization automation agents
Managing battery storage charging and discharging optimization for Fronius-equipped energy storage systems automation agents
not_for: Non-Fronius inverters (API is specific to Fronius inverter hardware)
Site selection and solar design (Fronius monitors existing systems, doesn't do pre-installation analysis)
Direct grid operator connection without proper licensing (grid interconnection requires utility agreements)
best_when: A solar installer, energy manager, or smart home integrator wanting AI agents to monitor Fronius inverter performance, access real-time energy flow data, and integrate solar production metrics with building energy management systems.
avoid_when: FRONIUS HARDWARE REQUIRED: Fronius API only provides data from Fronius inverters; automated generic solar monitoring assumption creates no data for non-Fronius hardware; automated must have Fronius inverters installed with network connectivity. LOCAL VS CLOUD API: Fronius offers both local HTTP API (on-site LAN access to inverter) and cloud Solar.web API (Fronius cloud); automated cloud API assumption may miss local LAN capabilities; automated must choose appropriate API based on deployment architecture. SOLAR.WEB REGISTRATION REQUIRED: Cloud monitoring via Fronius Solar.web API requires system registration and API credentials; automated direct inverter data access assumption creates authentication_required for cloud access; automated must register system in Fronius Solar.web. GRID EXPORT LIMITS: Fronius inverters configured with grid export limits follow utility regulations; automated unlimited grid export assumption creates regulatory violation in areas with export limits; automated must respect grid operator export limit configuration.

auth.notes: Fronius uses API key for Solar.web cloud API; local inverter has open HTTP API (no auth for LAN access). REST API with JSON. Wels, Austria HQ. Founded 1945 by Günter Fronius. Products: Symo/Primo/Galvo inverters, Fronius Solar.web monitoring, Smart Meter integration, Ohmpilot heat pump control, Wattpilot EV charger. SDKs: None public. Datamanager 2.0 local API + Solar.web cloud API. Austrian manufacturing, global install base. Competes with SMA and SolarEdge for solar inverter market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Solar.web free for standard monitoring; Solar.web Premium and API access may require subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Solar.web monitoring free; professional API access may have per-system fees; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Wels AT. Local API free. Solar.web API for registered systems. Austrian hardware global install base.

performance.rate_limits: Solar.web API: rate limited per registered system; local inverter API: unlimited on LAN

known_agent_gotchas: TWO SEPARATE APIS: Fronius has (1) local Datamanager HTTP API for on-site LAN access and (2) Solar.web cloud API for remote monitoring; automated single API assumption misses dual-access capability; automated must choose based on deployment (local for real-time LAN, cloud for remote monitoring)

LOCAL API REQUIRES INVERTER DATAMANAGER: Local HTTP API requires Fronius Datamanager card/module installed in inverter; automated all-Fronius-inverters-have-local-API assumption creates connection_refused for inverters without Datamanager; automated must verify Datamanager module installation

SOLAR.WEB RATE LIMITS ARE PER SYSTEM: Solar.web API applies rate limits based on registered system; automated unlimited polling assumption creates rate_limit_exceeded; automated must implement polling interval respecting Solar.web API rate limits (typically 15-minute minimum)

LOCAL API RETURNS CURRENT DATA ONLY: Fronius local Datamanager API typically returns current/live power flow data, not historical; automated historical data from local API assumption creates limited history; automated must use Solar.web cloud API for historical yield analysis

DATAMANAGER VERSION AFFECTS API: Different Fronius Datamanager versions have different API endpoints; automated single API version assumption creates endpoint_not_found for older Datamanager versions; automated must check Datamanager firmware version and adjust API accordingly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Solar inverter monitoring. GDPR, grid connection standards. API key + local HTTP. Austria/Global. Energy production and system data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Solar inverter. GDPR, grid standards. Local HTTP + API key. Global. Energy production and monitoring data.
